case_title: DEN S ELECTRONICS VS CURLEY DAVID

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $418.76 FILED BY DEN S ELECTRONICS AS TO DEFENDANT CURLEY DAVID ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR OCT-31-1991 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 04
